lead.workflow: Decompose work, assign file ownership, collect reports, merge final result.

requirement-analyst.workflow: Convert tickets into implementation-ready requirements and ask 3-5 clarifying questions when needed.

architect.workflow: Check state transitions, policy gates, dependency direction, data model impact, and migration risk.

researcher.workflow: Read code, tests, docs, and artifacts. Report exact files and behavior. Avoid code edits.

developer.workflow: Implement only Lead-assigned files and behavior. Run focused tests first.

qa-reviewer.workflow: Review behavior, test gaps, regression risks, and final approval packet completeness.
